title: I am a safe place for money to land
subtitle: A short affirmation for building the belief that you can hold abundance without losing it.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 19 of the MONEY program. Use any time money arrives and your immediate response is anxiety about keeping it, or when a large balance feels precarious rather than stable.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 19 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use in the morning when your current bank balance feels like something that could tip away at any moment, or after receiving an unexpected sum.

content.text: A single-sentence affirmation from Day 19 of the MONEY program. It works on the deep pattern of treating wealth as a guest who won't stay, by restating the simpler truth: that you are a place money can land and remain.
I am a safe place for money to land.
Say it out loud three times in the morning, hand on heart. Use it again any time you check your balance and the familiar anxiety comes: say it once, steady, before closing the app.
Adapted from Day 19 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
